saveframes.name: assembly
tags:
Nisin:Lipid II pores in lipid membranes. 
A stoichiometry of 8:4 Nis:LII units is assumed.

data: This entry displays the 1:1 Nis:LII complex structure calculated in DMSO
The molecular complex forms pores in bacterial membranes, disrupting the membranes.

saveframes.name: Nisin_Z
tags:
The X referes to Dehydrobutyrine, Dehydroalanine, D-AlalineS and AlanineS (Lanthionine) 
and Aminobutyric acid and AlanineS (3-Methyllanthionine). 
The CYS residues 7, 11, 19, 26, 28 should be regarded as an alanine crosslinked via a sulfour atom.
Thioether bonds (-S-) instead of dissulfide bonds (-S=S-) are present.

data: Synthesised in isolated M. flavus cellular membranes

saveframes.name: sample_conditions_1
tags:
Samples measured with a 1.3mm rotor at 60 kHz MAS and 3.2mm rotor at 17 kHz MAS. 
Cooling was employed to achieve desired temperature.
